name: product-ops
description: Product operations harness: a 6-stage execution SOP for small teams (1-2 PMs, 3-4 devs) plus 65 PM skills + 36 chained slash commands across discovery, strategy, execution, market research, GTM, marketing/growth, data analytics, and toolkit. Combines the original Scrut-tested SOP with phuryn/pm-skills (MIT, Pawel Huryn).
